name: Beans Rice
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Package frozen whole kernel corn
1 cup Raw white rice (can use brown, but should parboil a little)
1 jar (16 oz) Thick and chunky mild salsa
1.5 cups V8 (or you can blend together 3/4 cup Canned diced tomatoes with green chiles and 3/4 cup water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large baking dish, stirring to mix thoroughly.
3. Bake for 1.25 hours, or until rice is tender and casserole has started to thicken.
4. Serve with tortillas, fat-free sour cream, and/or FF cheddar cheese. Serves four.
